en.text: a prolonged form of a primary, but obsolete ὄμω, for which another prolonged form ὀμόω is used in certain tenses; to swear, i.e. take (or declare on) oath

senses.gloss_en: a prolonged form of a primary, but obsolete ὄμω, for which another prolonged form ὀμόω is used in certain tenses; to swear, i.e. take (or declare on) oath
